description: Schema fragment (menu_disk.json). Merged into src/schema.json by src/schema/build.py. Do not load directly -- cross-fragment $ref uses '#/definitions/...' against the bundled output.

menu_disk.description: /disk -- storage media menu. Holds the `settings` singleton sub-menu (USB/SMB auto-share defaults).

settings.description: /disk/settings -- singleton row controlling automatic media mounting/sharing.

id.description: Stable IaC identity token rendered into `comment=`. Example: `iac.disk.settings`.

id_pad.description: Trailing dot-segments of `id` to retain for ordering. Example: `1`.

comment.description: Free-form text appended after the `id` token in the RouterOS comment. Example: `"no USB sharing"`.

auto-media-interface.description: Interface (by `iac.*` token) that auto-mounted media should bind to. Example: `iac.bridge.lan`.

auto-media-sharing.description: Automatically share newly inserted media. Example: `false`.

auto-smb-sharing.description: Automatically expose media over SMB. Example: `false`.
